description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a prominent hip roof in a dark gray color. The exterior walls are a mix of white and natural wood paneling, giving it a contemporary yet warm appearance. Large vertical windows are present on both floors, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front of the house is landscaped with two stylized white-leaved trees and a green lawn, while the rear and sides are more minimal. The structure appears to have two stories, with a balcony or overhang above the main entrance. The overall look is clean, geometric, and well-suited for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A modern two-story house with a hip roof, wood and white exterior, large vertical windows, and landscaped front yard with stylized trees.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wood paneling, large vertical windows, and two stylized trees on the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the hip roof and wood columns, with minimal landscaping visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with wood paneling and a single stylized tree on the right.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entryway, two stylized trees, green lawn, and prominent vertical windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a flat overhang, flanked by large vertical windows and landscaped with two stylized trees.
